title: Emerald Equips
description: This Project Adds A Set Of Emerald Armour And 5 Tools (Emerald Pickaxe, Emerald Sword, Emerald Hoe, Emerald Shovel And Emerald Axe) That Are All Diamond Level
body:
This Is My First Modrinth Project, So I Kept It Simple.

Emerald Equips Adds 4 New Armour Pieces (Emerald Helmet, Emerald Chestplate, Emerald Leggings and Emerald Boots). It Also Adds Five New Tools (Emerald Pickaxe, Emerald Sword, Emerald Hoe, Emerald Shovel And Emerald Axe). All Of The Gear Is Diamond Level Or Slightly Above

(P.S. MAKE SURE U SELECT THE RIGHT VERSION AS THERE IS A SERVER EDITION TOO)
Available For Forge 1.20.1 And NeoForge 1.21.1
